rationale.R1.2: The section's reported pass@1 scores (NoCritique 76.8 > Single 74.2 > Full 71.4 on HumanEval+; 69.5 > 67.1 > 64.8 on MBPP-Plus) directly contradict the stated conclusion that 'the full 3-round loop delivers the strongest results on both benchmarks.' This inversion between evidence and conclusion makes logical consistency load-bearing: the section's central argument fails on its own numbers.
rationale.R1.3: Every quantitative claim in the ablation is falsified by Table 2 as described in the text. Verifying that reported figures actually support the interpretive narrative is the primary validation task for an ablation section, making evidence-claim alignment load-bearing.
rationale.R1.6: 'Review this section' canonically includes prose-level assessment; sentence clarity, internal narrative coherence, and paragraph structure are a primary expected deliverable of this delegation even absent a stricter scope signal.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review cover scientific and logical correctness—including whether the reported numbers support the stated conclusions—or is it scoped to writing quality and prose clarity only?
